steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The decisive clue is the note stating, “One service they provide is water treatment.” This directly links municipalities—like Tlahuiltepa—to a specific service they must offer.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice A explicitly ties Tlahuiltepa to water treatment, aligning with the key signal. B and D discuss general public services without naming the example, and C provides population data irrelevant to the question. That matches choice A — A is correct.
